title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model appearing as Oceanus V1 P (possibly Mythos) across coding, visual, reasoning, math, and agent tasks, achieving a perfect score of 70/70. The model outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and others in tests including web app development, visual tasks, game creation, and combinatorics problems.
